allow: Bash(xcodebuild build -project LinkLook.xcodeproj -scheme LinkLook -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -quiet)

Bash(xcodebuild -project LinkLook.xcodeproj -scheme LinkLook -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' build)
Bash(xcodebuild -project LinkLook.xcodeproj -scheme LinkLook -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' test)
Bash(xcodebuild -project LinkLook.xcodeproj -scheme LinkLook -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' test-without-building)
Bash(xcodebuild -project LinkLook.xcodeproj -scheme LinkLookCore -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' test)
Bash(xcodebuild test -project LinkLook.xcodeproj -scheme LinkLook -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -only-testing:LinkLookCoreTests)
